# Block legacy authentication

Blocks `exchangeActiveSync` and `other` (legacy) client app types for all users. Ships disabled - review excludes (e.g. break-glass accounts) before enabling.

Source: [`templates/01-block-legacy-auth.json`](https://github.com/LukeEvansTech/entra-ca-templates/blob/main/templates/01-block-legacy-auth.json).
